use_cases: Display grouped content with structured header, body, and footer sections
Create reusable card layouts for dashboards, product listings, or user profiles
Wrap form inputs or media content in a styled container
Build pricing tables or feature comparison cards
Container for dashboard widgets and analytics cards
ai_summary: Shadcn/ui Card is an atomic, minimalist card primitive system with composable subcomponents (CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter). It provides a clean container with rounded borders and subtle shadows, designed for flexible content layout. The component follows a flat visual style with no interactions, making it ideal as a foundational building block for any UI system.
